SessionStart.name: ss.plugin.update
SessionStart.description: Check GitHub for newer plugin version, auto-update if available

SessionStart.name: ss.tokens.scan
SessionStart.description: Scan project for expensive files, update config for token guard

SessionStart.name: ss.branches.check
SessionStart.description: Check for uncommitted/unpushed changes at session start, warn if dirty

SessionStart.name: ss.tasks.register
SessionStart.description: Register plugin scheduled tasks (self-calibration) via CronCreate

PreToolUse.name: pre.tokens.guard
PreToolUse.description: Block operations exceeding 2% of session token limit

PreToolUse.name: pre.ship.guard
PreToolUse.description: Block manual PR commands (redirect to /ship) and git push with dirty state

PostToolUse.name: post.flow.completion
PostToolUse.description: After code edits: verify changes, update issue status if tracked, recommend /ship when flow appears complete

PostToolUse.name: post.debug.trigger
PostToolUse.description: After 2+ consecutive Bash failures: recommend debug flow

UserPromptSubmit.name: prompt.git.sync
UserPromptSubmit.description: Periodic git pull/merge main into current branch (throttled, every 15 min)

UserPromptSubmit.name: prompt.issue.detect
UserPromptSubmit.description: Detect issue references in user message, set to In Progress or ask user

UserPromptSubmit.name: prompt.ship.detect
UserPromptSubmit.description: Detect ship intent in user prompt, enforce Skill('ship') over manual commands

UserPromptSubmit.name: prompt.start.detect
UserPromptSubmit.description: Detect app start intent, enforce completion card after starting

Stop.name: stop.ship.guard
Stop.description: Warn about uncommitted changes, suggest WIP commit before session ends
